title: Remyadry

cpu: AMD Ryzen 7 2700U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes:
Work very well!
Perform "export LANG=zh_CN.GB18030" before game launched if you got corrupt CJK fonts. Dont forget the system tuning. Enable it in "/etc/locale.gen", then generate locales by command "sudo locale-gen".
